title: Bundle O' Many Things
description: Ooh! let me see what i have in my bundle
body:
_The Bundle O' Many Things; any decent drifter's best friend. - some old guy on the side of the road. Our scientists have managed to pull 5 unique things out of the bundle, it is unkown what a drifter is or how a flying anvil can fit in a tiny bundle._

This magical bundle is yet another A.B.E. artifact, holding right click while holding it for 2 seconds will produce one of 5 effects.

- Give you 49 lead bushes that weigh you down
- Teleport you 12 meters in the direction you're looking
- Summon an anvil in the sky to crush you
- Blind you for 10 seconda
- Explode
